scope.summary: Seeded L1 capability fixtures cover supported typed, LOB, REF CURSOR, output, cache, TPC, SODA and VECTOR paths, with an explicit pre-23 VECTOR rejection and DRCP identity-bleed fixture.
out_of_scope: Live Oracle containers were not available in this scoped run.

entry_points.name: Rig L1 fixture-plan regression
entry_points.trace: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target cargo test -p oraclemcp --test e2e_harness rig_l1_dry_run_is_a_single_command_with_complete_lane_plan -- --exact passed.

limitations: Live fixture seeding and DRCP execution require the operator's existing Oracle containers and credentials.
